ink.$description: Default button label color — M3 on-primary.

ink-active.$description: Label color when active or pressed.

canvas.$description: Default button background — M3 filled button (primary).

canvas-hover.$description: Background for hover state — M3 8% state layer.

canvas-active.$description: Background for active/pressed state — M3 12% state layer.

border-color-active.$description: Border color when the button is selected/active.

border-width.$description: Base border width — M3 filled button is borderless.

border-radius.$description: Corner radius — M3 buttons use the full (pill) shape.

font-size.$description: Base font size for button labels — M3 label-large (14px).

font-weight.$description: Font weight for button labels — M3 label-large (Medium 500).

line-height.$description: Base line height for buttons — M3 label-large (20/14).

letter-spacing.$description: Letter spacing for button labels — M3 label-large tracking.

text-transform.$description: Text transform — M3 dropped uppercase button labels.

padding-inline.$description: Inline (horizontal) padding for standard buttons — M3 24px gutter.

padding-block.$description: Block (vertical) padding (min-height drives the 40px M3 target).

gap.$description: Gap between button icon and label — M3 8px.

group-gap.$description: Gap between buttons when rendered in a group.

justify-content.$description: Main axis alignment for button contents.

icon-size.$description: Default icon size within buttons — M3 18px icon.

box-shadow.$description: Default box shadow — M3 filled button rests at elevation 0.

box-shadow-hover.$description: Box shadow on hover — M3 filled button lifts to elevation 1.

transition-duration.$description: Duration for hover/active transitions — M3 short motion.
